title: armeria littoralis var. filicaulis
intro: Armeria littoralis var. filicaulis, also known as coastal thrift or sea thrift, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a member of the primrose family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and wounds, due to its ability to stimulate blood circulation and promote tissue repair. Armeria littoralis var. filicaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting wound healing.
